name: ASUS ZenScreen Ink MB14AHD 14" IPS Portable Monitor - 1920x1080 - 10-Point Touch - Stylus Pen w/ 4096 Levels Pressure - 2x USB Type-C (DP Alt mode) - Micro HDMI - Headphone Jack - Integrated Stepless Kickstand - Built-in ¼”-threaded Tripod Socket
